query: What usually makes setup take longer?
direct_answer: Simple setups can move faster, while fuller room transformations, staircase moments, and multi-area installs naturally take longer. Porch & Party quotes and schedules setup time based on the real design and access conditions.
best_for: This page is for clients trying to understand how much time should be blocked for setup before guests arrive or before the room needs to be ready.
not_for: Requests outside the Memphis metro service area, full-service vendor coordination, or services Porch & Party does not offer by default.
